papers.title: MoVerse: Real-Time Video World Modeling with Panoramic Gaussian Scaffold
papers.abstract_snippet: We present MoVerse, a real-time video world model that creates an interactively navigable scene from a single narrow-field-of-view image. This setting is challenging because the input observes only a small fraction of the environment, while interactive roaming requires a complete surrounding world, persistent geometry, controllable camera motion, and temporally coherent high-fidelity observations. MoVerse addresses this problem by separating world construction from observation rendering. It firs
papers.reason: 提出基于全景高斯支架的实时视频世界模型，从窄视角图像重建可交互漫游的全景场景。属于视觉表示学习，虽对具身智能有潜在价值，但缺乏机器人操作层面的直接应用路径或实验验证。

papers.title: Mana: Dexterous Manipulation of Articulated Tools
papers.abstract_snippet: Articulated tool manipulation remains a major challenge in dexterous robotics due to the need to coordinate internal degrees of freedom and contact-rich interactions. While prior work has largely focused on rigid objects, articulated tool use remains underexplored because of its physical complexity and the difficulty of learning functional grasping and manipulation policies. We present Mana (Manipulation Animator), a general sim-to-real framework that reinterprets dexterous manipulation as an an
papers.reason: 针对铰接工具（如剪刀、钳子）的灵巧操作难题，提出协调内部自由度与接触丰富交互的方法。填补了VLA在复杂非刚性/多部件物体操作上的空白，为提升灵巧操作泛化能力提供新思路，值得精读。
